idea-plugin.name: Prompt Whisperer
idea-plugin.description:
Prompt Whisperer — local-first assistant for crafting high-quality AI coding prompts.

  • Implementation Modes: Standard, Architecture, Debugging, Security Review, and Test Generation prompts.
  • Engineering Profiles: nine profile-driven behaviours (Balanced Engineer, Senior Architect, Security Engineer, and more).
  • Troubleshooting Mode: evidence-based debugging with no-loop protection and shell profile safety.
